products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: A range of cements adapted to all your construction projects

cpj42.name: CPJ 42.5
cpj42.desc: High-quality versatile cement for reinforced concrete, floor slabs and common civil engineering works. The benchmark choice for most construction projects in Morocco.

cpj32.name: CPJ 32.5
cpj32.desc: Cement for common masonry, interior and exterior plastering, and bedding mortars. Ideal for residential projects and finishing works.

products.packaging: Packaging: 50 kg bags | Bulk | Big Bag

process.title: Our Manufacturing Process
process.subtitle: From raw material to finished product, discover each step of our clinker grinding process

step1.title: Clinker Reception
step1.desc: Clinker is received and stored at our Lassargua facility. We ensure rigorous quality control at every delivery, verifying the chemical composition and physical properties of the raw material.

step2.title: Fine Grinding
step2.desc: Clinker is finely ground in our high-performance ball mills. The grinding process guarantees optimal fineness to ensure the mechanical characteristics of the finished cement.

step3.title: Dosing & Additions
step3.desc: Precise dosing of additives (gypsum, limestone, fly ash) guarantees the specific characteristics of each cement type. Each formulation is rigorously controlled by our laboratory.

step4.title: Packaging & Shipping
step4.desc: Cement is packaged in 50 kg bags, big bags or shipped in bulk. Our optimized logistics ensure fast and reliable delivery across Southern Morocco and beyond.

history.title: Our History
history.text: Dakhla Aménagement S.A. is a public limited company founded in 2015 by visionary Mauritanian investors, with the conviction that the Dakhla region needed modern cement infrastructure to support its rapid development.

timeline.t2Text: Launch of the Lassargua grinding center

blog.subtitle: News, technical advice and innovations in the cement industry

article1.title: How to choose the right cement for your construction project
article1.excerpt: CPJ 42.5 or CPJ 32.5? Discover the essential criteria for selecting the right cement for your project, from strength to usage conditions.

article2.title: Dakhla Aménagement surpasses 500,000 tonnes of annual capacity
article2.excerpt: Our grinding center continues to develop to meet the growing demand of the Southern Moroccan market.

article3.title: Moroccan cement standards: what you need to know

article5.title: New infrastructure project in Dakhla: our contribution
